rows.label: tev032101_MSG1001
rows.name:
The anti-aircraft turrets targeting our ship
are in three different places, all right?
So make sure you you destroy them all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_MSG1002
rows.name:
Normally, a few turrets would be no threat to
us at all, you know? But the surprise landing
has made all our countermeasures go haywire...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Fefen about the Ma-non.

rows.label: tev032101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Fefen if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Fefen about recent developments.

rows.label: tev032101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Myself, Rutantan, and Tutura
are the Ma-non's delegates on
this particular voyage, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_MSG0002
rows.name:
Rutantan is sort of like our manager, I
suppose? He oversees our technology and
decides who to to dispatch where, at any rate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Tutura is more like the business leader, you might
say? He sells the tech that we build via Candid &
Credible. He's also pretty good at it, don't you agree?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_MSG0004
rows.name:
As for me, I have taken it upon myself to immerse
myself in your culture by sampling your pizzas and
engaging in casual chats like like like this one![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_MSG0008
rows.name:
Hey, [ST:playername ]! You've really impressed us
with your attitude, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_MSG0009
rows.name:
Now that we're all friends,
you're free to walk around our
ship. Er, if you want...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_MSG0010
rows.name:
But if you do walk around, I suppose you should
talk to to every last Ma-non and help the ones in
trouble. That's what friends are for, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_MSG0011
rows.name:
So the Bias have moved
to the city, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_MSG0012
rows.name:
We went ahead and and opened up
the port side of the ship so they
have a place to live, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_MSG0013
rows.name:
Well, I hope they don't find it too too claustrophobic.
It used to be our storage area, so there are still a
bunch of containers floating around, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_MSG0014
rows.name:
So the Orphe have moved
to the city, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_MSG0015
rows.name:
They said they need to be surrounded by plants in
order to feel at home, so we sort of...borrowed
some of your human pots and planters for the ship?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_MSG0016
rows.name:
It sure is nice to be one with nature,
isn't it? Do you think we could maybe
grow a huge tree right here on our ship?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_MSG0017
rows.name:
So the Zaruboggan have
moved to the city, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_MSG0018
rows.name:
Apparently they eat garbage and waste products
and basically everything we DON'T want on
the ship? I think I like them already![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_MSG0019
rows.name:
Our disposal bills are going
to go way way down. It's a
win-win, as you humans say?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_MSG0020
rows.name:
So the Larsians have moved
to the city, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_MSG0021
rows.name:
I was worried they might find life on our
ship boring, you know? I mean, since they
pretty much just want to fight all the time...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_MSG0022
rows.name:
But their so-called "meditation" and
training have been keeping them
plenty occupied, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_MSG0023
rows.name:
And I must admit, their mock battles
can be very... entertaining?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_MSG0024
rows.name:
The Ma-non ship has brightened up
quite a bit thanks to to all our new
xenoform neighbors, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_MSG0025
rows.name:
Everyone was worried we might not get along, right?
But soon we learned they were just as nervous as us,
and we were able to break the proverbial ice...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_MSG0026
rows.name:
We owe these new
friendships to to you, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev032101_MSG0027
rows.name:
I wish I could reward you, but instead I will
give you a big Ma-non smile and a pat on the
back, all right? ...Good. There there.[ST:wait ]
